title: Over Door Hooks Over Door Hangers 2Pcs Dipping Plastic Rustproof with Anti-Scratch ThickeningFits Under 3.7 cm Door Widths as Over Cabinet Hooks, Christmas Xmas Wreath Hanger, Coat Hook(White)
features: 【Sturdy & Durable】Door hanger hooks are made of high-quality metal, durable, sturdy and reusable. Max capacity: 30LB. Suitable for doors whose thickness does not exceed 3.7 cm. Please measure your door before purchasing.

【Anti-Scratch & Anti-Silde】Our door hooks are thickening coated with dipping plastic technology to ensure door hooks are rust-proof and durable. They are coated with thick plastic to avoid damaging your door and make it fit snuggly your door without moving around.
【Easy to Use, No Nails Hooks】No drilling or tools are needed, suitable for avoiding drilling indoors. Hooks over doors can be hung directly where it needs to be stored.

【Multifunctional Hanger】Back of door hooks is a space-saving, flexible alternative and addition to wardrobes, closets, and racks. No more mess that troubles you is ideal for the kitchen, bathroom, living room, bedroom, office, or dorm to organize your accessories.
【100% After-Sales Guarantee】If unsatisfied with our door hangers, you can contact us via email to return or refund within 90 days!
description: Product information Lmytdo door hangers are a perfect choice anywhere you might need an inexpensive addition or space-saving alternative to a wardrobe, closet, or rack. Our door hooks are coated with thick plastic to avoid damaging your door paint and make it fit snuggly your door without moving around. Specifications Color: white, black Size: 5 x 3.7 x 0.5inches Weight: 100 g Fits doors below : 3.7cm (1.46inch) Maximum bearing weight: 30LB Package includes: 2 x Over door hooks
